channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 400 Million Idle Gaming PCs Could Be The AI Era's Secret Weapon
item.description: Bitcoin miners pivoted their data centers to AI. But a less visible shift is happening from the bottom up, as crypto's GPU networks find a second life...

item.title: Jimmy Lai’s children beseech Trump to argue for media mogul’s release in upcoming Beijing visit
item.description: “The president has said multiple times that this is a case that he cares about,” Sebastien Lai said about Trump during a call with reporters.

item.title: Chipotle CEO allegedly suggests company would keep raising prices and 'lean into' customers making over $100K
item.description: Chipotle CEO allegedly suggested targeting customers earning over $100,000 per year in leaked audio, sparking controversy over potential price hikes.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Wednesday, February 11
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: U.S. Olympians earn just 5% of what Singapore pays—many are forced to juggle jobs as baristas, brokers, and dentists just to get by
item.description: Most Olympians don’t bring home a major paycheck for their sport.

item.title: Why HBO’s ‘Harry Potter’ Show Won’t Be ‘The Biggest Streaming Event’ In History
item.description: WB believes that the Harry Potter HBO show may be the biggest streaming event in the history of the medium. It might be close.

item.title: China claims the Hong Konger just sentenced to 20 years in prison is Chinese. The UK begs to differ
item.description: The British government said it is expanding an immigration route to more residents of Hong Kong, with tens of thousands estimated to be immigrating.

item.title: Wyoming state board votes to cancel wind leases in two counties
item.description: State officials voted to begin canceling wind leases for projects in eastern Wyoming, citing a court ruling and concerns from residents over transpare...

item.title: Republican elite in Georgia still roiled by collapse of $140 million Ponzi scheme, 7 months later
item.description: “We feel like we’re never going to see it, as old as we are," Thomas Todd, a 77-year-old retired business owner.

item.title: Chinese shoppers can’t get enough of Disney’s Zootopia and Ralph Lauren’s ‘old money’ look despite nationalistic vibes
item.description: Chinese brands dubbed “guochao,” or national tide, sit side by side with American brands in mainland retail stores.

item.title: American Airlines pilots, flight attendants rebuke CEO's leadership
item.description: American Airlines flight attendants union issues historic no confidence vote against CEO Robert Isom, citing operational failures and lagging competit...

item.title: These Great American Innovators Won Fame — But Not Fortune — From Their Inventions
item.description: Our upcoming ranking of America’s 250 Greatest Innovators is aimed at those who were able to commercialize their innovations, but these less fortunate...

item.title: Russia Is Launching FPVs From Drone Motherships
item.description: Russian Gerbera long-range decoy/attack drones are now acting as motherships for small FPV quadcopters.

item.title: Economic calendar: Stay tuned for retail sales, business inventories and more
Dow opens in record territory despite new concern about consumers — live updates
Dollar trends toward 4-year low with ‘sell America’ theme back on traders’ minds
Retail-sales data show tariffs altered U.S. consumers’ buying habits at year-end
Market sees increasing likelihood of Fed interest-rate cut in March
Beef prices in focus as Trump signs order aimed at consumer relief
item.description: President Trump signed an executive order to boost beef imports from Argentina in a move that aims to lower soaring ground beef and steak prices for c...

item.title: Super Bowl LX players lose thousands to California's 'jock tax' on athlete income
item.description: Players competing in Super Bowl LX in Santa Clara will face California's jock tax, which subjects players to taxes for days spent in the state prepari...

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
